scripts.check: npm run check:pi-source && npm run check:format && tsgo --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace @deepscience/frontend
scripts.check:format: biome check --error-on-warnings packages/science/src/index.ts packages/science/src/permission packages/science/src/tools/basic.ts packages/science/src/tools/index.ts packages/science/src/tools/provenance.ts packages/science/test packages/server scripts/dev.mjs packages/frontend/src
scripts.build:pi: npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-tui && tsgo -p vendor/pi/packages/ai/tsconfig.build.json && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-agent-core && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-orchestrator
scripts.build: npm run build:pi && npm run build --workspace @shying/ds-science && npm run build --workspace @shying/deepscience
scripts.resources:validate: python3 packages/science/resources/skills/experimental-data/scripts/catalog.py validate && python3 packages/science/resources/skills/biological-knowledge/scripts/catalog.py validate && python3 packages/science/resources/skills/literature/scripts/catalog.py validate
scripts.pretest: npm run build:pi && npm run build --workspace @shying/ds-science
scripts.test:pi: npm test --workspace @earendil-works/pi-tui && npm test --workspace @earendil-works/pi-ai && npm test --workspace @earendil-works/pi-agent-core && npm test --workspace @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run check
